metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code skills, packaged as installable plugins. Add the marketplace once, then install individual skills on demand.

plugins.name: drawio-figure-iterate
plugins.description: Author print-legible draw.io figures through a generate -> export -> read -> score -> fix loop. Bundles the iterate skill, a headless-export wrapper, a PIL-metrics generator, and an optional draw.io MCP server.

plugins.name: md-to-docx-pdf
plugins.description: Render Markdown to a styled DOCX and PDF (PDF via LibreOffice headless): title page, inline formatting, content-weighted auto-width tables, lists, code, embedded images. Single- or multi-document builds.

plugins.name: codex-adversarial-review
plugins.description: A two-round methodology for stress-testing prose, claims, or code with an adversarial second model (Codex): brief with attack vectors, synthesise adopt/reject/pushback, re-attack and rule on pushbacks.

plugins.name: cc-statusline
plugins.description: Install or port a multi-line Claude Code statusLine read entirely from the CLI's stdin JSON (no external services, no polling): model + cwd, upstream git repo + branch, a context-window progress bar with token counts, and the 5-hour & 7-day subscription rate-limit windows with reset countdowns. Ships POSIX-sh and Windows PowerShell implementations. Idempotent install that preserves existing settings; every segment degrades gracefully.

plugins.name: claude-multi-account
plugins.description: One-time setup of two isolated Claude Code accounts (work + personal) that run simultaneously via per-account CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR shell wrappers. Keeps the existing login on bare `claude` and wraps only the second account so they never race over one credential slot; branches the design when the existing login is the sensitive work account. Self-deletes after verified success.

plugins.name: resilient-host
plugins.description: Set up and verify a reboot/power-loss-resilient Claude Code remote-control host as independent layers: a systemd user service running `claude --remote-control` inside a dedicated tmux PTY (Restart=always + API pre-check), user linger for no-login boot, SSH enabled, GRUB hidden/zero-timeout, and a BIOS power-on rule. Privileged steps are owner-run sudo blocks. OS/kernel-hang recovery (a hardware watchdog) is intentionally out of scope for now and will be added later.
